urdu transliteration text:
Hai to aakhir ko woh maa kehta hai zair ka yaqeen
Being a mother after all, I believe
Dhoondhi hogi usse ro ro ke raahon mein kahin
english translation text: She must have looked for him along many paths while crying

urdu transliteration text: Kehti hogi ke tere naaz uthaloon
english translation text: She must have said, let me take care of you

urdu transliteration text: Aaj ki raat tujhe godhi mein sulaloon mere asghar aaja
english translation text: Let me put you to sleep in my lap tonight, come my Asghar
